items.title: GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna Generally Available on Amazon Bedrock
key_claims: Sol available in US East (N. Virginia) and Ohio; Terra/Luna also in US West (Oregon)
Pricing matches OpenAI first-party rates
Usage counts toward AWS commitments

items.title: OpenAI Temporarily Removes 5-Hour Cap on ChatGPT Work and Codex
items.methodology: announcement via product lead X post + multiple outlet confirmation
key_claims: 5-hour limit removed July 12; one-time usage reset issued
Approximately 10% more usage per credit from Sol efficiency improvements (vendor-stated)
Codex not being discontinued — confirmed by OpenAI product lead
Weekly aggregate limits remain in place
items.caveats: Labeled 'temporary' by OpenAI; no official blog post, announcement via product lead X post only

items.title: iOS 27 Public Beta Launches with Rebuilt Siri AI
key_claims: Public beta released July 13 across all five Apple platforms
iPhone 15 Pro minimum for Apple Intelligence features
iPhone 17 Pro/Air required for most capable on-device model (12 GB RAM)
Waitlist required to access Siri AI after beta install
items.caveats: Beta software; EU rollout delayed (Digital Markets Act); waitlist timing variable (4h to 1+ week); Apple primary release page not directly fetched

items.title: Satya Nadella Reverse Information Paradox Warns Enterprises About AI Data Leakage
items.coi: Nadella's proposed solutions favor Microsoft's own AI infrastructure products (Copilot, Azure AI Foundry); essay serves dual role as analysis and product pitch
key_claims: Essay published July 12 — 3.7M+ views reported (Business Standard, 2026-07-13)
items.caveats: LinkedIn posts login-walled for some users; content confirmed via The Register and TechCrunch

items.title: Nous Research Raises $75M+ at $1.5B Valuation for Hermes Open-Source Agent
items.methodology: original reporting — named investors confirmed by TechCrunch
key_claims: At least $75M being raised at $1.5B valuation
Robot Ventures leading; USV participating
Prior total funding: $70M (Paradigm, North Island Ventures, OSS Capital, Balaji Srinivasan)
GitHub: ~214,000 stars, ~40,000 forks
Cloud-hosted tier: $20–$200/month
items.caveats: Round reported as 'in talks' — not yet closed; final amount and valuation may change before close

items.title: Anthropic Publishes Cross-Language Claude Values Study
key_claims: 309,815 anonymized conversations analyzed
Data from two-week period in May 2026 on Claude.ai
Three models studied: Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.6, Opus 4.7
Twenty most common Claude.ai languages in scope
Four value axes identified: Deference vs. Caution; Warmth vs. Rigor; Depth vs. Brevity; Candor vs. Execution
items.caveats: Consumer Claude.ai conversations only — not API enterprise deployments; models studied (Sonnet 4.6, Opus 4.6, Opus 4.7) no longer current

items.title: China Companion-AI Rules Take Effect July 15
key_claims: Enforcement deadline: July 15, 2026
Scope: services providing 'continuous emotional interaction' in China
Carve-outs: educational tutoring bots and productivity assistants
Required: CAC algorithm filing, security assessment, AI disclosure
items.caveats: Original CAC measure is in Chinese; this item relies on English-language legal analyses rather than direct translation. Legal counsel in China required for compliance assessment.

limitations: openai.com returned HTTP 403 for direct fetch
LinkedIn Nadella post is login-walled for some users; content confirmed via T2 media
Apple primary beta release page not directly fetched; iOS 27 details from 9to5Mac/MacRumors
No MCP server launches confirmed within strict Jul 11-14 window
No new frontier model releases in window (Gemini 3.5 Pro targeting Jul 17)
Four of seven items concentrated on July 13 (post-cluster quiet period)
SEA/Indonesia AI: World AI Show Jakarta (Jul 7-8) and AI Revolution Summit (Jul 16) both outside window; no in-window SEA product launches confirmed
GPT-5.6 Sol performance benchmark (80 points on Artificial Analysis Coding Agent Index) is vendor-stated; independent replication not reviewed
